message:
Add --semantic flag to jfp suggest command

- Add --semantic flag for optional MiniLM reranking
- Falls back to hash-based embeddings when model unavailable
- Update default limit from 5 to 3
- Async function to support semantic reranking

Closes bead 1a3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-0d1","title":"Implement end-to-end test suite (e2e/)","description":"**Details:**
- Full user flow tests using Playwright
- Test critical paths: search → view → copy → install
- Test cross-browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- Test mobile viewports
- Test offline mode (PWA)

**Critical E2E Flows:**
1. **Search & Copy Flow:**
   - Load homepage
   - Type in search bar
   - Click prompt card
   - Click copy button
   - Verify clipboard content

2. **Basket & Export Flow:**
   - Add multiple prompts to basket
   - Open basket sidebar
   - Export as ZIP
   - Verify ZIP contents

3. **SpotlightSearch Flow:**
   - Press Cmd+K
   - Type query
   - Navigate with arrow keys
   - Press Enter to copy

4. **Skill Install Flow:**
   - Click install button
   - Verify command copied to clipboard

5. **Mobile Flows:**
   - Test touch interactions
   - Bottom sheet prompt detail
   - Swipe gestures

**Logging Requirements:**
- Detailed step-by-step logs
- Screenshot on failure
- Network request logging
- Console error capture

**Framework:** Playwright

**Test Organization:**
```
e2e/
  tests/
    search-copy.spec.ts
    basket-export.spec.ts
    spotlight.spec.ts
    mobile.spec.ts
    pwa-offline.spec.ts
  fixtures/
    ...
  playwright.config.ts
```

**Reasoning:** E2E tests validate entire user journeys work correctly. Critical for catching integration issues between frontend components.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:32.191748492-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:32.191748492-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-0d1","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r9m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:08.628822653-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-1ty","title":"Add privacy-respecting analytics (optional Plausible)","description":"Part 7.10 of PLAN. Optional analytics tracking: prompt_view, prompt_copy, search (query length + result count, emit zero_results when count==0, optionally hash query), export, skill_install, workflow_copy. Use Plausible or similar privacy-respecting service. No PII collection. Disabled by default, user opt-in.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:46:00.153609872-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:46:00.153609872-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-1ty","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-fnf","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:49:15.167409134-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

@@ -102,7 +102,8 @@ cli
 cli
   .command("suggest <task>", "Suggest prompts for a task")
   .option("--json", "Output JSON")
-  .option("--limit <n>", "Max suggestions (default: 5)")
+  .option("--limit <n>", "Max suggestions (default: 3)")
+  .option("--semantic", "Enable semantic reranking (downloads MiniLM on first use)")
   .action(suggestCommand);
 
 cli
